column2: 1. I found it hard to wind down
column3: 2. I was aware of dryness of my mouth
column4: 3. I couldn’t seem to experience any positive feeling at all

column16: 15. I felt I was close to panic
column17: 16. I was unable to become enthusiastic about anything
column18: 17. I felt I wasn’t worth much as a person
column19: 18. I felt that I was rather touchy
column20: 19. I was aware of the action of my heart in the absence of physical exertion (eg, sense of heart rate increase, heart missing a beat)
column21: 20. I felt scared without any good reason
column22: 21. I felt that life was meaningless
